name: shop
tagline: ClawHub (126★): Ultimate personal shopping assistant: find, compare, buy, gift, and reorder products across the Shop catalog containing mil
verdict: Clean across the board — security, quality, and hygiene all top marks, a well-built integration. Only nitpicks: no stated 'not for' boundary, and the Shopify package install isn't version-pinned (minor, since it's an official scoped package from a known publisher).

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language appears anywhere in the frontmatter description or body; the skill never points to a better-suited skill for adjacent tasks.
Install/upgrade commands use @latest of a scoped, well-known publisher package (@shopify) from the standard npm registry with no version pin — per rubric, unpinned installs of well
